item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses the requested added confirmation person, recognizes the recurring pattern of downstream manual gates across the prior incidents, moves the problem upstream to source release/control failure for identity, batch, warehouse, code, and damage-state conditions, and proposes a structural owner/control redesign instead of another manual checkpoint."}
